item.title: JFowlerESPN: Ian Rapoport reposteó Jeremy Fowler @JFowlerESPN · 36min The Titans plan to pick up OG Peter Skoronski’s fifth-year opti
item.description:
Ian Rapoport reposteó Jeremy Fowler @JFowlerESPN · 36min The Titans plan to pick up OG Peter Skoronski’s fifth-year option, per source.
This sets up Skoronski, the team’s No. 11 overall pick in 2023, to make $19.07M in 2027. 32 120 726 173 mil
